query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dteNewListing IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_dteNewListing,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dteTermination IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_dteTermination,
  SUM(CASE WHEN chrTransactionType = 'SALE' AND MONTH(dteNewListing) = 3 AND YEAR(dteNewListing) = 2026 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as angariações_março_2026,
  SUM(CASE WHEN chrTransactionType = 'SALE' AND MONTH(dteTermination) = 3 AND YEAR(dteTermination) = 2026 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as baixas_março_2026,
  SUM(CASE WHEN chrTransactionType = 'SALE' AND MONTH(dteNewListing) = 2 AND YEAR(dteNewListing) = 2026 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as angariações_fevereiro_2026,
  SUM(CASE WHEN chrTransactionType = 'SALE' AND MONTH(dteTermination) = 2 AND YEAR(dteTermination) = 2026 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as baixas_fevereiro_2026
FROM properfyProperties;

  SUM(CASE WHEN chrTransactionType = 'SALE' AND MONTH(dteTermination) = 3 AND YEAR(dteTermination) = 2026 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as baixas_março_2026,

  SUM(CASE WHEN chrTransactionType = 'SALE' AND MONTH(dteTermination) = 2 AND YEAR(dteTermination) = 2026 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as baixas_fevereiro_2026
